welcome.title: Welcome to UO-Compagnon
welcome.subtitle: Your personal academic guide at the University of Ottawa.
welcome.studentDesc: Log in to define your phase, view your priority content and receive important alerts.
welcome.adminDesc: Access the control panel to manage content, notifications, and view statistics.

welcomeLanding.heroDesc: UO-Compagnon supports every step of your university journey from visa prep to midterms with the right information at the right time.
welcomeLanding.featureTitle: Everything you need, right when you need it
welcomeLanding.quote: UO-Compagnon saved me so much stress. I always knew what to do each week without getting lost in emails and official websites.
welcomeLanding.ctaTitle: Ready to start your Ottawa journey?
welcomeLanding.ctaText: Join hundreds of international students already supported by UO-Compagnon.

phases.title: Before arrival
phases.desc: Visa, housing, health insurance, budget everything you need before you leave.

phases.desc: Student card, uoZone, Brightspace, orientation your arrival guided step by step.

phases.title: Midterm period
phases.desc: GPA, academic integrity, exams, dropping courses stay on track and confident.

features.title: Contextual content
features.desc: Resources automatically adapt to your journey phase and your academic program.

features.title: Progress tracking

features.title: Verified resources
features.desc: All content is validated by uOttawa administration reliable and always up to date.

features.title: Designed for you
features.desc: Built around the unique challenges international students face in Canada.

features.title: Secure access
features.desc: Sign in with your @uottawa.ca address your platform, your private space.

questions.directDesc: Ask your questions directly to administration. These questions are attached to your profile.
questions.anonymousDesc: Ask sensitive or confidential questions here. Admins cannot see your personal details, and answers are delivered back securely.
questions.submitError: Error submitting the question. Please try again.
questions.emptyDirect: You have not asked any direct questions yet.
questions.emptyAnonymous: You have not asked any anonymous questions yet.

faq.title: Admin FAQ
faq.subtitle: Here are the most common questions administrators receive from international students.
faq.q1: Can I change my arrival date or class start date?
faq.a1: Not yet. Date editing is not available in the application for now.
faq.q2: What is UHIP and why do I need it?
faq.a2: The University Health Insurance Plan is mandatory for international students and covers basic medical care in Ontario.
faq.q3: Who do I contact if I am late for Welcome Week?
faq.a3: Contact the International Mentoring Centre (mentoring@uottawa.ca) for remote support.
faq.q4: Can I switch my language preference permanently?
faq.a4: Yes. Use the EN/FR button in the sidebar to switch the whole interface dynamically.
